name: Seafood and Vegetable Omelet (Cheon)
recipeIngredient: 5 oz White meat fish fillets (such as cod or swordfish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the shrimp by cutting open along the back and deveining.
2. Wash the oysters in salted water and pat dry. Cut the fish fillets into 1/4 inch slices.
3. Wrap the tofu in a cloth and let it drain on a chopping board for 30 minutes. Then cut into 1/2 inch thickness. Slice the pumpkin thinly.
4. In a bowl, mix the batter ingredients: 2 eggs, 1 egg yolk, 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon crushed garlic, MSG (optional), and pepper.
5. Lightly dust the seafood and vegetables with flour. Shake off excess flour.
6. Heat oil in a skillet. Dip the ingredients into the batter and place them in the skillet.
7. Cook both sides of the ingredients, pressing out water using a fork if needed.
8. Arrange on a serving plate and serve with vinegared soy sauce.
Source: Quick & Easy Korean Cooking for Everyone by Ji Sook Choe & Yukiko Moriyama
